title: Project Manager (UAT) (Renewable Contract)
description:
We are representing for our client hiring for a UAT Project Manager.

Summary

Our User Acceptance Testing (UAT) Project Management team ensures that our Online offerings work as designed, and deliver the magical experiences that we intend. This team understands our systems deeply, creates a test plan to evaluate our new offerings, and provides final quality sign off before they go live.

As a UAT Project Manager, you will direct and drive medium to large-sized, global cross-functional UAT and have a direct impact on one of the world’s largest e-commerce sites. Inclusion is a shared responsibility, and we work together to foster a culture where everyone belongs and is inspired to do their best work. We believe this role will place you in a highly-energized environment with some of the most hardworking, creative individuals in theindustry.

You will be inspired to share and continue building on your years of experience while providing extraordinary support to an amazing team! Inclusion is a shared responsibility and we work together to foster a culturewhere everyone belongs and is inspired to do their best work.

Description

  • You are responsible for project managing simultaneous medium-to-large multi-functional UAT projects worldwide, and delivering them in line with major release events.
  • You will develop deep subject matter expertise of E2E customer journeys, business processes, and impacted systems, and have the ability to innovate creative solutions.
  • You lead and collaborate with multiple partner teams to connect the dots and drive success.
  • You will dynamically develop and drive comprehensive cross -functional UAT Plans and strategies.
  • You will manage, plan, and organize activities and tasks throughout UAT planning and execution.
  • You lead, take forward thinking action, and provide goal-oriented direction in the face of ambiguity.
  • You will keep the extended team informed and ensure accountability to the resolution of key issues.
  • You develop and sustain strong and trusted relationships with all cross -functional partners.
  • You lead test resources for successful execution of projects and provide input to and craft the UAT management processes in-line with industry best practices.        
  • You contribute to an inclusive environment through respecting each others’ differences and having the curiosity to learn and demonstrate Apple’s values of inclusion and diversity in daily activities.

Key Qualifications

  • 5+ years of relevant UAT and full fledge Project Management experience.
  • 5+ years of technical ability, capable of quickly understanding complex integrated systems.
  • Possess a thorough understanding of the UAT/Project Lifecycle within the digital commerce space.
  • Ability to lead testing efforts across various teams and viewed as a trusted advisor and partner.
  • An effective communicator (written and spoken), able to fully comprehend issues, manage timeline and see around corners to understand downstream impacts.
  • Skilled to combine critical thinking with hands-on execution when driving multifunctional, complex, large testing efforts to achieve UAT sign off.        
  • Detail oriented, quality-focused with analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Demonstrated experience of good facilitation, negotiation, and conflict resolution skills.
  • PMP, Automation and SAP experience is a plus.

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.

Employment Agency License No.: 02C3423
